headline: Evaluating Cigna Group (CI) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Specialty Pharmacy Growth Narrative
summary: Cigna Group (CI) stock has been under pressure recently, with a 1-day return of 1.9% but declines over the past week, month and past 3 months, prompting closer attention to its core health services business. See our latest analysis for Cigna Group. At a share price of $265.88, Cigna Group’s recent 7-day and 30-day share price returns of 5.47% and 7.62% declines, alongside a 1-year total shareholder return of a 12.98% decline, suggest momentum has been fading rather than building. headline: The Cigna Group (CI) CEO Change Timing May Come As Surprise to Some Investors, According to Barclays
summary: The Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) is included in our list of the 11 best value stocks to invest in according to billionaires. Amid the company’s announcement of a leadership change and reaffirmation of its long-term earnings outlook, The Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) continues to attract investor attention.
